name: Salmon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. I prefer red salmon; pink is acceptable.
2. Remove the dark skin and crush the bones to mask the flavor.
3. Cut celery into 1-inch pieces.
4. Grate the celery and onion.
5. Combine the salmon, grated onions and celery in a medium bowl.
6. Add lemon juice, dill weed, chopped egg, salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Mix all ingredients well.
8. Chill the mixture thoroughly. This is excellent on croissants.
9. Yield: approximately 2 ½ cups
